# AgentLens

> Real-time observability and debugging dashboard for AI agents. Chrome DevTools for AI agents.

AgentLens is an open-source monorepo. Install two packages and add one line of code to see every LLM call, tool execution, memory operation, cost, and hallucination your agent makes — in a live dashboard.

## Packages

- [Python SDK](sdk-python/README.md): `pip install agentlens-sdk` — trace Python agents
- [Server](server/README.md): `pip install agentlens-server` — backend + REST + WebSocket
- [TypeScript SDK](sdk-typescript/README.md): `npm install @agentlens-sdk/sdk` — trace Node.js agents
- [MCP Server](mcp-server/README.md): `pip install agentlens-mcp` — zero-code Claude Desktop integration
- [Dashboard](dashboard/): React frontend, `npm run dev` on port 5173

## Quick Start

```bash
pip install agentlens-server agentlens-sdk
agentlens-server &          # REST: http://localhost:8766  |  WS: ws://localhost:8766/ws
```

```python
from agentlens_sdk import auto_instrument
auto_instrument()           # patches OpenAI + Anthropic automatically — no other changes needed
```

Open `http://localhost:5173` and run your agent.

## Architecture

- **Server** runs on a single port (8766): REST at `/api/v1/*`, WebSocket at `/ws`
- **WebSocket protocol**: client sends `{"type":"hello","role":"sdk|dashboard"}` first; server echoes back then pushes live events
- **Database**: SQLite (`agentlens.db`), auto-created on first run, no migrations needed
- **IDs**: all identifiers are ULIDs (26-char base32, sortable by time)
- **Timestamps**: ISO 8601 UTC throughout
- **JSON fields** in DB stored as TEXT, serialized/deserialized in the service layer

## Key Source Files

- [server/src/main.py](server/src/main.py) — FastAPI app, WebSocket handlers, startup
- [server/src/routers/](server/src/routers/) — traces, sessions, costs, hallucinations, memory, replay
- [server/src/services/](server/src/services/) — business logic for each domain
- [server/src/schemas/](server/src/schemas/) — Pydantic request/response models
- [server/src/utils/pricing.py](server/src/utils/pricing.py) — per-model token pricing table
- [server/src/utils/text_similarity.py](server/src/utils/text_similarity.py) — sentence-transformers + keyword fallback
- [server/src/services/hallucination_service.py](server/src/services/hallucination_service.py) — number-transposition and semantic drift detection
- [sdk-python/src/agentlens_sdk/__init__.py](sdk-python/src/agentlens_sdk/__init__.py) — Python SDK public API
- [sdk-python/src/agentlens_sdk/trace.py](sdk-python/src/agentlens_sdk/trace.py) — @trace decorator and SpanContext
- [sdk-python/src/agentlens_sdk/interceptors/](sdk-python/src/agentlens_sdk/interceptors/) — OpenAI, Anthropic, LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, Semantic Kernel patches
- [sdk-typescript/src/index.ts](sdk-typescript/src/index.ts) — TypeScript SDK public API
- [dashboard/src/](dashboard/src/) — React 18 + Vite + Zustand + D3.js + Recharts frontend

## REST API (server)

All endpoints prefixed `/api/v1/`.

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/sessions` | List sessions |
| GET | `/sessions/{id}` | Session detail |
| DELETE | `/sessions/{id}` | Delete session |
| POST | `/traces` | Ingest batch of trace events |
| GET | `/traces/{session_id}` | Get events (optional `?event_type=llm_call`) |
| GET | `/traces/{session_id}/tree` | Events as nested tree |
| GET | `/costs/{session_id}` | Cost breakdown by model |
| GET | `/costs/{session_id}/hotspots` | Most expensive steps |
| GET | `/costs/{session_id}/suggestions` | Cheaper model suggestions |
| POST | `/hallucinations/check` | Run hallucination detection `{"session_id":"..."}` |
| GET | `/hallucinations/{session_id}` | Existing alerts |
| POST | `/memory` | Create memory entry |
| GET | `/memory/{session_id}` | List memory entries |
| GET | `/memory/{session_id}/{key}` | Key + version history |
| PATCH | `/memory/entry/{id}` | Edit memory content |
| DELETE | `/memory/entry/{id}` | Delete memory entry |
| GET | `/replay/{session_id}` | Ordered event stream for replay |
| GET | `/health` | `{"status":"healthy"}` |

## Trace Event Schema

```json
{
  "session_id": "01JKXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX",
  "event_type": "llm_call",
  "event_name": "summarize",
  "timestamp": "2026-03-06T12:00:00Z",
  "duration_ms": 340.0,
  "model": "gpt-4o-mini",
  "tokens_input": 512,
  "tokens_output": 128,
  "cost_usd": 0.000154,
  "input_data": {"messages": [...]},
  "output_data": {"content": "..."},
  "status": "success",
  "parent_event_id": null
}
```

`event_type` values: `llm_call`, `tool_call`, `decision`, `memory_read`, `memory_write`, `user_input`, `error`

`cost_usd` is auto-calculated from `model` + token counts if omitted.

## Supported Frameworks

| Framework | How |
|-----------|-----|
| OpenAI | `auto_instrument()` patches `AsyncOpenAI` / `OpenAI` |
| Anthropic | `auto_instrument()` patches `AsyncAnthropic` / `Anthropic` |
| LangChain | `AgentLensCallbackHandler` callback |
| CrewAI | `auto_instrument()` auto-detects and wraps agents |
| AutoGen | `auto_instrument()` auto-detects `ConversableAgent` |
| Semantic Kernel | `instrument_semantic_kernel(kernel)` |
| Any Python | `@trace(name="step")` decorator |
| TypeScript | `trace(fn, { name: "step" })` wrapper |
| MCP agents | `agentlens-mcp` stdio server, zero code |

## Optional: llms-full.txt

For full API docs, schema definitions, and implementation details see individual package llms.txt files:
- [sdk-python/llms.txt](sdk-python/llms.txt)
- [sdk-typescript/llms.txt](sdk-typescript/llms.txt)
- [server/llms.txt](server/llms.txt)
